text: I am filled with a quiet curiosity, standing on the edge of organized knowledge and creative exploration. The glass-walled room hints at minds at work, shielded by transparency, while the display dedicated to research and development vibrates with possibility. The words evoke childhood excitement—a sense that, in this space of inquiry and invention, something important and new is about to be born. I feel attentive, part of a larger story of mindful progress.
